news.paragraph: Gold is experiencing downward pressure as rising Treasury yields and a stronger US dollar weigh on the metal's price. Although central bank accumulation offers a long-term bullish perspective, recent headlines highlight declining ETF values driven by inflation concerns and geopolitical uncertainty. There are no imminent catalysts like earnings or regulatory decisions mentioned in the current news flow.

headlines.title: Investors Are Choosing Bitcoin Over Gold to Fight Inflation. Here's How That Could Backfire.
